title: Shareable Links
excerpt: Is it possible to include formula and/or progress columns when creating shareable links?

posts.author: rwilliams (Robert Williams)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to include formula and/or progress columns when creating shareable links?

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rwilliams

If you are referring to Sharing a Board View Publicly when you say “Shareable Link”, then I can confirm that both The Formula Column and The Progress Tracking Column are supported!

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Cheers,
Jenna

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rwilliams

It look like this post here Shareable Links - #2 by jennap might have answered your question, is that correct?

If not, feel free to ask any additional questions you have!

Best,

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @rwilliams

I hope the answers in this thread are useful!
As we haven’t had any updates here, I’m going to go ahead and mark this thread as solved.
This means that the thread will close in 7 days time

If you have any additional questions or you feel your original query wasn’t resolved, please feel free to let us know and we’ll be happy to continue to assist!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
